title: juncus dolichanthus
intro: Juncus dolichanthus, also known as Chinese rush or Japanese rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Juncus dolichanthus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Juncus dolichanthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
